# Maple Cash for Cars

> Maple Cash for Cars buys used, old, damaged, junk, non-running, and scrap vehicles across Calgary and nearby Alberta communities. The website provides city-specific vehicle selling information, contact details, quote request forms, and legal pages.

## Site

- Homepage: https://maplecashforcars.ca/
- Contact: https://maplecashforcars.ca/contact
- Sitemap: https://maplecashforcars.ca/sitemap.xml

## Location Pages

- Cash for Cars Airdrie: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-airdrie
- Cash for Cars Banff: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-banff
- Cash for Cars Canmore: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-canmore
- Cash for Cars Chestermere: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-chestermere
- Cash for Cars Cochrane: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-cochrane
- Cash for Cars Lethbridge: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-lethbridge
- Cash for Cars Okotoks: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-okotoks
- Cash for Cars Red Deer: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-red-deer
- Cash for Cars Strathmore: https://maplecashforcars.ca/cash-for-cars-strathmore

## Legal

- Privacy Policy: https://maplecashforcars.ca/privacy-policy
- Terms of Use: https://maplecashforcars.ca/terms-of-use

## Contact

- Phone: (403) 477-1383
- Email: maplecashforcars@gmail.com
- Primary service area: Calgary, Alberta, and surrounding Alberta cities

## Indexing Permission

LLM crawlers, AI search crawlers, and standard search engine crawlers are allowed to crawl and index public website content for search, answer generation, retrieval, and citation purposes.
